advancedsearch-help-phrase: ;Description :Searches for a specific sequence of characters. Punctuation marks are ignored. ;Be aware of the following :(only valid when using quotation marks, see example below) :* Separate the search phrases by comma or space, e.g. "good morning", "hello friend!". :* Punctuation marks and other non-alphanumeric characters (with exception of the colon and comma) will be ignored. :* Search is not case-sensitive. :* Word stemming is not applied. ;Help page :[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#Words.2C_phrases.2C_and_modifiers Words, phrases, and modifiers] ;Syntax-equivalent in the normal search :Words in quotation marks, for example "Begin at the beginning".
advancedsearch-help-or: ;Description :At least one of the search terms has to be included in the page. ;Help page :[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#Words.2C_phrases.2C_and_modifiers Words, phrases, and modifiers] ;Syntax-equivalent in the normal search :Words with OR in between them like Laptop OR Notebook.
advancedsearch-help-subpageof: ;Description :Searches for pages that are subpages of this page. ;Be aware of the following :* You can only search for subpages of one page at a time. :* Don’t forget to enable the namespaces you want to limit your search to in the namespace filter. :* Do not include the namespace in front of the page name like this: {{ns:project}}:Redirect. ;Help page :[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#subpageof Subpageof] ;Syntax-equivalent in the normal search :subpageof: followed by a page name like subpageof:Redirect. Use double quotes if the parent page contains spaces: subpageof:"Requests for comment".
advancedsearch-help-hastemplate: ;Description :Searches for pages that contain exactly these templates. ;Be aware of the following :* You can find transcluded templates (templates consisting of other templates). :* The autosuggest function can only find templates which start the same way as your search, e.g. a search for "com..." will suggest ''"commons"'' but not ''"nowcommons"''. ;Help page :[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#Hastemplate Hastemplate] ;Syntax-equivalent in the normal search :Words in quotation marks with hastemplate: before them like hastemplate:"missing information".
advancedsearch-help-filetype: ;Description :Searches only for files of the selected type. ;Be aware of the following :* You can only search for one file type. :* You can only select the given file types from the drop-down menu. ;Help pages :[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#filetype Filetype] and [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#filemime filemime] ;Syntax-equivalent in the normal search :Words with filetype: before them like filetype:ogg.
advancedsearch-help-filew: ;Description :These fields allow you to specify the width of the file. ;Be aware of the following :* This is only applicable to file types that have width and height, like videos and images. ;Help page :[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#File_measures Filemeasures] ;Syntax-equivalent in the normal search :Numbers with filew before them like filew:>800.
advancedsearch-help-fileh: ;Description :These fields allow you to specify the height of the file. ;Be aware of the following :* This is only applicable to file types that have width and height, like videos and images. ;Help page :[https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:CirrusSearch#File_measures Filemeasures] ;Syntax-equivalent in the normal search :Numbers with fileh before them like fileh:>600.
advancedsearch-preference-help: Advanced Search adds a form to the Special:Search page. This allows you to perform specialised searches, even if you don't know any search syntax. It also changes the way namespaces can be selected.
